set-variable.value: #[{ "value": [ { "po_no": 40418062, "line_no": 3, "item_id": "WF3P02018JTIMONIUM", "supplier_part_no": "WF3P02018JTIMONIUM", "qty_ordered": 960, "qty_received": 0, "unit_price": 75.59, "company_no": "FFP", "unit_size": 1, "unit_quantity": 960, "config_1": null, "config_2": null, "carrier_id": "859394", "ship2_name": null, "packing_slip_number": null, "ship2_add1": null, "ship2_add2": null, "ship2_city": null, "ship2_state": null, "ship2_country": null, "buyer_id": "495436", "ship2_zip": null, "shipping_instruction": null, "external_po_no": "/345678", "customer_part_number": null, "carrier_code": null, "po_type": "B", "sales_order_number": null }, { "po_no": 40418062, "line_no": 1, "item_id": "HFU640UY020J", "supplier_part_no": "HFU640UY020J", "qty_ordered": 16, "qty_received": 0, "unit_price": 851.98, "company_no": "FFP", "unit_size": 1, "unit_quantity": 16, "config_1": null, "config_2": null, "carrier_id": "859394", "ship2_name": null, "packing_slip_number": null, "ship2_add1": null, "ship2_add2": null, "ship2_city": null, "ship2_state": null, "ship2_country": null, "buyer_id": "495436", "ship2_zip": null, "shipping_instruction": null, "external_po_no": "/345678", "customer_part_number": null, "carrier_code": null, "po_type": "B", "sales_order_number": null }, { "po_no": 40418062, "line_no": 2, "item_id": "HFU640UY045J", "supplier_part_no": "HFU640UY045J", "qty_ordered": 8, "qty_received": 0, "unit_price": 614.22, "company_no": "FFP", "unit_size": 1, "unit_quantity": 8, "config_1": null, "config_2": null, "carrier_id": "859394", "ship2_name": null, "packing_slip_number": null, "ship2_add1": null, "ship2_add2": null, "ship2_city": null, "ship2_state": null, "ship2_country": null, "buyer_id": "495436", "ship2_zip": null, "shipping_instruction": null, "external_po_no": "/345678", "customer_part_number": null, "carrier_code": null, "po_type": "B", "sales_order_number": null } ] }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set Variable

logger.doc:name: LOG INFO : Valid Acknowledgement
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "flow": (flow.name), "message": "Acknowledgement validation successful, Moving forward to create the Acknowledgement in p21", "correlationId": correlationId }]
